## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Upload file '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python Version: [e.g., 3.12]
- DTAT OCR Version: [e.g., commit hash or version]
- Running via: [Docker / Local / CLI]
- GPU: [e.g., None, NVIDIA RTX 3080]

## Document Information (if applicable)
- File type: [e.g., PDF, JPG, XLSX]
- File size: [e.g., 2MB]
- Document type: [e.g., scanned, native PDF, image]

## Logs
```
Paste relevant log output here
```

## Additional Context
